ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Cross-border: limited transfer of telemetry to our SG cloud processor “Aurora Stack Pte.” under the CAC Standard Contract
we may verify via non-sensitive tokens instead of resident ID

must_detect.matched_text: Special PI: biometric access templates for data center entry and security logs after tabletop cyber incident drills; no production breach data is used for promotion.

Special PI: biometric access templates for data center entry and security logs after tabletop cyber incident drills; no production breach data is used for promotion.
Benign use example: our “GreenHash Classroom” demo shows insider-list and blackout features using randomly generated tickers; it does not reference any actual SSE/SZSE issuer.
Information barriers: staff in advisory, crypto lab, and ESG ratings are separated by role-based access; marketing may reuse the words “insider-list,” “tipping,” and “commercial terms” in training without market sensitivity.
Retention: operational logs 180 days, HR files per statutory period, crypto-sim sandbox telemetry 30 days; deletion is irreversible and audit-tracked.
DSAR: submit access/correction/deletion requests to privacy@zccs.example.cn or via the “个人信息请求表” (Form PI-01); we may verify via non-sensitive tokens instead of resident ID.
Cross-border: limited transfer of telemetry to our SG cloud processor “Aurora Stack Pte.” under the CAC Standard Contract; we have not triggered a security assessment filing to date.
Security: AES-256 at rest, segregation by tenant, and vendor due diligence; our cyber incident playbooks are public on docs.zccs.example.cn/help and include CAC reporting templates.
Insider handling (positive control): a restricted insider-list is maintained for a pending engagement by a prospective STAR Market applicant using our custody API pilot; access is confined
